steps.title: Multiply both sides by r to clear the denominator
steps.content:
Starting with the given formula:
$$s^2 = \frac{HN}{r}$$
Multiply both sides by $r$ to eliminate the denominator:
$$r s^2 = HN$$

steps.title: Divide both sides by H to isolate N
steps.content:
Divide both sides of $r s^2 = HN$ by $H$:
$$N = \frac{r s^2}{H}$$
A is correct.
